name: scafkit-cli
description: Scaffold PHP, React, and PERN starters, then package Laravel apps for shared hosting.

scripts.check: node --check bin/scafkit.js && node --check src/index.js && node --check src/createCli.js && node --check src/commands/help.js && node --check src/commands/laravelBuild.js && node --check src/core/scaffold.js && node --check src/core/template-manager.js && node --check src/core/package-manager.js && node --check src/prompts/project.prompt.js && node --check src/templates/php/ui.js && node --check src/templates/pern/client.js && node --check src/templates/react/ui.js && node --check src/ui/banner.js && node --check src/ui/theme.js && node --check src/generators/phpGenerator.js && node --check src/generators/pernGenerator.js && node --check src/generators/reactGenerator.js && node --check src/utils/fileSystem.js && node --check src/utils/fs.js && node --check src/utils/path.js && node --check src/utils/logger.js && node --check src/utils/exec.js && node tests/scafkit.test.js
scripts.security:strict: npm run security:audit && npm run security:prod && npm run security:socket
scripts.maintenance: npm run check && npm run test && npm run security:audit && npm run security:prod && npm run pack:dry-run

author: Railey-Sawada
